title: Malaysian Turkey Mince Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and quick Malaysian-inspired stir fry made with turkey mince, perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: Silky oyster sauce
ingredients.notes: Optional, omit for a vegetarian version

ingredients.name: Malaysian stir-fry spices
ingredients.notes: Pre-mixed spice blend or individual spices like cumin, coriander, and chili flakes

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of festive oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and bell pepper and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the grated ginger and minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the turkey mince and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until it is no longer pink, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the Malaysian stir-fry spices, salty soy sauce, and silky oyster sauce (if using). Stir-fry for 1-2 minutes.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Transfer the stir-fry to a serving platter and garnish with fresh cilantro.
